author: yama662607
description: Enables AI agents to use MCP tools for semantic vault search and editor actions via the companion MCP server. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: yama662607
manifest.description: Enables AI agents to use MCP tools for semantic vault search and editor actions via the companion MCP server.
manifest.name: Companion MCP

name: Companion MCP

releases.author: yama662607
releases.description:
- Expanded `schema://tool-inputs` with concrete `read_note`, `read_active_context`, and `edit_note` argument shapes
- Added `edit_note` migration hints so agents prefer structured objects over fragile long JSON strings
- Included example payloads for `replaceTarget`, `replaceText`, and `insertAtCursor`
releases.name: v0.3.8

releases.author: yama662607
releases.description:
- Compact output for `read_note`, `read_active_context`, `edit_note`, and `search_notes`
- Added explicit `line` anchor guidance for sequential note reading
- `readMoreHint` now advances by the same line window for `line` anchors
- Bounded metadata, document maps, edit previews, and lexical snippets to keep responses small
releases.name: v0.3.6

releases.author: yama662607
releases.description:
Companion MCP plugin 0.2.9 release.

Highlights:
- adds a real Biome lint gate to local quality checks
- keeps review-bot regressions covered in local source-scan tests
- fixes plugin build resolution for node builtin specifiers

releases.author: yama662607
releases.description:
Companion MCP plugin 0.2.8 release.

Highlights:
- adds discovery-first vault workflows for large vaults
- adds note move support
- updates semantic search to return bounded excerpts instead of full note content
- lightens editor mutation responses for MCP clients

releases.author: yama662607
releases.description:
Plugin release 0.2.7

- fix latest Obsidian review-bot findings around Promise rejection typing, server typing, and settings UI text
- keep release assets aligned with the current plugin source

releases.author: yama662607
releases.description:
Release 0.2.6 for the Obsidian Companion plugin.

Includes:
- normalize plugin-side missing-file ENOENT into structured NOT_FOUND responses
- reduce noisy request-handling console errors for stale note paths

releases.author: yama662607
releases.description:
Release 0.2.5 for the Obsidian Companion plugin.

Includes:
- review-bot compatibility fixes for console usage, UI text, and async promise handling
- configDir discovery without hardcoded defaults
- transport and prompt cleanup required by the Obsidian review process

releases.author: yama662607
releases.description:
Release 0.2.4 for the Obsidian Companion plugin.

Includes:
- preserve YAML frontmatter arrays on note content updates
- preserve array types in get_note metadata responses
- shared frontmatter parsing/rendering across plugin and MCP fallback

releases.author: yama662607
releases.description:
Release 0.2.3 for the Obsidian Companion plugin.

Includes:
- vaultPath handshake support for MCP startup auto-configuration
- editor range validation and structured validation errors
- note deletion response consistency fixes
- metadata version alignment for community plugin publishing

releases.author: yama662607
releases.description:
Community plugin validation fixes for Obsidian directory submission.

- plugin id/name updated for directory policy compliance
- root manifest.json added
- root LICENSE added
- release assets regenerated
releases.name: Companion MCP Plugin 0.1.3

releases.author: yama662607
releases.description:
Community plugin release 0.1.2

Assets:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- versions.json

Highlights:
- MCP runtime stabilization updates
- Shebang startup regression fix for npx flow
- Documentation and review workflow improvements
releases.name: Obsidian Companion MCP 0.1.2
